note: Curated picks with representative list prices — no provider exposes a uniform pricing API, so verify current rates before relying on them for budgeting.

models.name: Claude Sonnet 4.6
models.note: Best all-round quality-per-dollar; strong at code and tool use.

models.name: GPT-4o
models.note: Fast frontier model, broad ecosystem support.

models.name: Gemini 2.5 Pro
models.note: Huge context window; cheapest of the frontier tier at short inputs.

models.name: Claude Haiku 4.5
models.note: Cheap and quick, keeps Claude's tool-use quality.

models.name: Gemini 2.5 Flash
models.note: Excellent price/quality for high-volume routine work.

models.name: GPT-4o mini
models.note: Cheapest OpenAI option for simple tasks.

models.name: Claude Sonnet 4.6
models.note: Top pick for agentic coding and refactors.

models.name: Llama 3.3 70B (Groq)
models.note: Very fast, generous free tier — great default for local-first setups.

models.name: Llama 3.1 8B (Cerebras)
models.note: Fastest tokens/sec available; free tier for light use.
